# daytona_organization_otel_config_by_sandbox_auth_token (Data Source)

Reads OpenTelemetry export configuration for a Daytona sandbox auth token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_organization_otel_config_by_sandbox_auth_token" "example" {
  auth_token = "sandbox-auth-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_token` (String, Sensitive) Sandbox auth token used to look up OpenTelemetry export configuration.

### Read-Only

- `endpoint` (String) OpenTelemetry collector endpoint.
- `headers` (Map of String, Sensitive) OpenTelemetry request headers.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
